zh.lifeSummary: 當Maud Echyngham於大約1352年出生在英國素可艾欽加姆時，她的父親Sir William Echyngham20歲，母親Elizabeth Criol17歲。她於1375年與Sir Henry Clarke Forde結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1400年在英國英格蘭肯特萊坦享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maud Echyngham于大约1352年出生在英国素可艾欽加姆时，她的父亲Sir William Echyngham20岁，母亲Elizabeth Criol17岁。她于1375年与Sir Henry Clarke Forde结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1400年在英国英格兰肯特萊坦享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Maud Echyngham was born about 1352, in Etchingham, Sussex, England, her father, Sir William Echyngham, was 20 and her mother, Elizabeth Criol, was 17. She married Sir Henry Clarke Forde in 1375. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died about 1400, in Wrotham, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maud Echyngham est née environ 1352, à Etchingham, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Echyngham, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Criol, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Henry Clarke Forde en 1375. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1400, à Wrotham, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maud Echyngham um 1352 in Etchingham, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Echyngham 20 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Criol 17. Sie hat 1375 Sir Henry Clarke Forde geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb um 1400 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Wrotham, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maud Echyngham è nata il circa 1352 nel Etchingham, Sussex, England, sua padre, Sir William Echyngham, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Criol, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato Sir Henry Clarke Forde nel 1375. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì circa 1400, nel Wrotham, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 50 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Maud Echyngham(이)가 대략 1352년 영국 수세스 트친그함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Echyngham(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Criol(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1375년 Sir Henry Clarke Forde(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1400년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 로섬에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maud Echyngham родилась около 1352 г. в местности эчингхам, суссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William Echyngham было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Criol, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Henry Clarke Forde в 1375 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла около 1400 г. в местности ротам, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 50 лет.
